name: Coco-Carmel Toast
recipeIngredient: 4 slices White, whole wheat, or raisin bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, flaked coconut, and soft butter or margarine.
3. Toast the bread slices.
4. Spread the brown sugar mixture onto each toasted slice of bread.
5. Place the slices on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees for 10 minutes.
